phase_title: Competition Web Experience, Replay Fallback, and Submission Gate
activation_note: The human explicitly approved activation of the exact reviewed and installed COMP-C-v2 pack. This governance activation commit must not execute the payload. A subsequent Codex run must execute only COMP-C, verify and decode only the canonical five-chunk payload producing exactly the eleven-file allowlist, perform no migration, database mutation, or real application network access, stop after Automation v2 Prepare, and must not activate or execute 10H-A or any successor in the same run.
